text: Founder dashboard launched — live subscriber stats, changelog, and links to all analytics in one private page.
Added CAN-SPAM mailing address to brief emails, plus a /terms page and data-source attribution on Live + every brief.
"The Take" added to the brief — an Office Take + Bar Argument up top, with a jump-link in the section nav.
Live page now shows verified records & streaks (e.g. "youngest Monaco winner ever, 5 straight") and golf playoff detection — pulled from real data, never invented.
NBA + MLB games get a GuyTalk Read on Live: series state, records, top performer, pitching matchups — free from ESPN, no paid feed.
Fixed a bug that would have broken the next morning's auto-brief (markets section), plus a broken Culture layout.
F1 constructor identity badges on Live (brand colour + monogram) in place of plain dots.
Fixed the Live → Today's Brief 404 and mobile navigation across the site; added Archive search.
